ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the races table */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the ethnicities table */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individuals (e.g., 0-9, 10-19) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individuals (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the locations table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External identifier for integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the race entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the race entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External identifier for integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the ethnicity entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the ethnicity entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the location entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the location entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., CDC, WHO, local health department) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source for reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the data source entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the data source entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Researcher, Data Analyst, Administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON object or comma-separated list) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the role entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the role entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
